description.summary: Create professional diagrams from hierarchical text in LibreOffice Impress
description.description: LibreImpress SmartArt enables users to quickly create structured diagrams (Hierarchy, Hub & Spoke, Process Flow) from simple hierarchical text input. Simply enter your points with indentation, select a diagram type, and let SmartArt generate a professional-looking diagram instantly.
description.release-notes: Version 0.1.0 - Initial MVP Release - Support for Hierarchy diagrams - Support for Hub & Spoke diagrams - Support for Process Flow diagrams - Custom color palette support - Default styling templates
